title: davallia scoparia
intro: Davallia scoparia, also known as the Rattlesnake Fern or Autumn Brake, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its unique, chain-like fronds. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Davallia scoparia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Davallia scoparia can be prepared as a tea, powder, or infusion for herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
